Growth AI · Paid Performance
High confidenceMeta + Google + TikTok + WooCommerceLast sync: today 08:42
Stale creative
Shopping creative stale — 30 days
CTR dropping, ROAS declining. Rose Bouquet in this campaign has only 3 days stock. Refresh creative or pause.
Attribution gap
Meta over-reporting revenue by 38%
Meta claims $98K but WooCommerce verified only $61K. True ROAS 2.4× vs claimed 3.9×. Google gap is only 7%.
Budget shift
Retargeting POAS 2.1× — scale candidate
Premium Bouquets Retargeting is your most profitable campaign. Google Wedding Search at 1.5× POAS also strong.

ROAS & spend trends
ROAS vs. POAS · 9 weeks
3.4×
↓ from 4.1×
True ROASProfit ROASTarget 3.0×
↓ROAS fell 4.1× → 3.4× over 9 weeks; Profit ROAS nearing breakeven. Steepest drop follows the Meta algorithm change in W7.
Return per $1 spent · 9 weeks
$2.80
↓ from $4.10
Each bar = dollars returned per dollar spent that week
⚠Every dollar returned $4.10 nine weeks ago — now $2.80. As spend climbed 29%, each dollar works for less. Bars shrinking toward breakeven is the diminishing-returns signal.
Ask Magellan anything…
